summary: Verified bug fix: switching companies now resets ALL toolbar filters (search, date range, needs-review chip) and returns to page 1. Also verified the amber 'filtered' badge feature (appears on any active filter, disappears when cleared, and shows an inline 'clear' link when total=0). All 8 UI assertions passed; backend confirms 400,LLC has 1,871 txns.
critical_code_review_comments: Company-switch effect at Transactions.jsx:102-106 correctly resets all filter state; useEffect deps on [currentId] is correct.

Note: the required_credentials list mentions '254, LLC (id dea036e7-...)' but that company does NOT exist in the pro@axiom.ai account (available: Marketing Co LLC, NextGen LLC, Bright Beans, 400 LLC, TEST_*). Testing used Marketing Co,LLC → 400,LLC which validates the same flow. Not a bug in the fix itself — worth clarifying in future test specs or seeding the referenced company.
Transactions.jsx is 583 lines — still under the 700 line guideline but the sub-modals (ManualTxnModal, SplitModal, LinkModal) could be extracted for maintainability.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Filter-reset-on-company-switch fix works. Pro user does not have '254, LLC' — the test flow substituted 'Marketing Co, LLC' as the pre-switch company (134 txns, filtered down to 2 with search='starbucks' + date range Jun 2026 + Needs Review) then switched to '400, LLC' via [data-testid=company-switcher] → get_by_text('400, LLC', exact=True). After switch: search='', date_from='', date_to='', filter chip='All', indicator='Showing 1–250 of 1,871'. The amber 'filtered' badge behaves correctly (present when any of search/date/review active; absent otherwise; renders inline 'clear' button when total=0).
rca of the issue: Original bug: sticky filters across company switches. Fix at Transactions.jsx lines 102-106 adds a useEffect on [currentId] that resets search/debouncedSearch/dateFrom/dateTo/filter/page. Verified in-browser end-to-end.
